description: You are a freelance TTRPG adventure writer preparing your 4-page fantasy adventure, 'The Crypt of the Ashen King', for PDF publication. Apply the professional layout requirements detailed in the style guide at /home/ga/Desktop/module_style_guide.txt to the unformatted document at /home/ga/Documents/ashen_king_module.odt. Ensure all formatting rules for titles, headings, read-aloud text, stat blocks, and tables are applied and save the document.

metadata.title_text: The Crypt of the Ashen King
read_aloud_samples: The heavy stone doors are warm to the touch
Eerie whispers echo through this long hall
A massive figure sits slumped upon a throne of fused bone
